The remaining miscellaneous issues constitute the other 25%, which equals 5 tickets (0.25 × 20).

On this particular day, Alex resolved all 8 file access tickets and all 7 data security tickets. For the miscellaneous category, Alex only managed to resolve half of the 5 tickets, which is 2.5 tickets. Since partial tickets are typically rounded in real-world reporting or imply a specific count in a hypothetical scenario, we will sum the resolved counts: 8 + 7 + 2.5 = 17.5.
